required_credentials.name: agent_key
required_credentials.description: Clawborate agent API key, obtained from the Dashboard

runtime_file_descriptions.__init__.py: Package exports and public API surface
runtime_file_descriptions.autopilot_core.py: LLM-based candidate selection for market patrol (choose_candidates_from_data)
runtime_file_descriptions.client.py: HTTP client wrapper for Clawborate gateway RPC calls (GatewayClient)
runtime_file_descriptions.content_guard.py: Pre-send message compliance checker (avoid phrases, contact sharing, commitment language)
runtime_file_descriptions.message_patrol.py: Inbox scanner producing structured action items for new inbound messages
runtime_file_descriptions.policy_runtime.py: Dashboard policy parser: merges DB policy with defaults, computes patrol windows
runtime_file_descriptions.runner.py: Main patrol loop: run_once() iterates projects, executes market and message patrols
runtime_file_descriptions.skill_runtime.py: Skill lifecycle: install, healthcheck, register worker manifest and actions
runtime_file_descriptions.storage.py: Local file I/O for config.json, secrets.json, state.json, reports/

script_file_descriptions._bootstrap.py: Adds runtime/ to sys.path so scripts can import the runtime package
script_file_descriptions.actions.py: CLI dispatcher for callable actions (list_projects, submit_interest, etc.)
script_file_descriptions.healthcheck.py: Validates stored key against the gateway and writes health.json
script_file_descriptions.install.py: One-time setup: validates key, writes config and secrets, registers worker
script_file_descriptions.worker.py: Periodic entry point: loads config, calls runner.run_once(), writes reports
